Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff John Lavaysse And Jason Lavaysse
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Josephine Alioto, Esq. (415-553-6055) for Plaintiff/ opposing party John Lavaysse.
Alex Kwok, Esq. (415-268-8000) for Defendant/Moving party THOMAS KARABIN and SEAM PHUONG.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Both sides ARGUED. Plaintiff submits to filing a cross complaint against the senior. Plaintiff argues filing a cross complaint against minor, Jason Lavaysse. Defendant responds. Plaintiff requests a time frame for the filing of the Cross-Complaint. Defendant does not object. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS THOMAS KARABIN and SEAM PHUONG'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff John Lavaysse And Jason Lavaysse is taken under submission. Parties to submit proposed orders.
